# Kevin Liu

> Kevin Liu is a Computer Science student at Princeton University (Class of 2028), full-stack developer, AI engineer, and hackathon winner. He builds interactive web applications, AI-powered tools, games, and health-tech solutions. His portfolio showcases 30+ projects as an interactive Pokémon Showdown-inspired battle game called PortfolioMon Showdown.

## About Kevin Liu

- [Portfolio Website](https://kevinliu.biz): Interactive developer portfolio built as a Pokémon Showdown-inspired turn-based battle game featuring 30+ projects as PortfolioMons
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Kevin-Liu-01): Open-source projects and contributions
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kevin-liu-princeton/): Professional profile and experience
- [X (formerly Twitter)](https://x.com/kevskgs): Updates and announcements
- [Alternate Portfolio](https://www.kevin-liu.tech): Secondary portfolio site

## Key Skills and Expertise

- Full-Stack Web Development: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, tRPC, Tailwind CSS
- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning: LLM integration, computer vision, speech recognition, AI agents, MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- Game Development: Browser-based games, interactive experiences, turn-based systems
- Health Technology: Wearable sensors, digital diagnostics, assistive technology
- Hardware & IoT: Embedded systems, sensor integration, smart recycling
- UI/UX Design: Responsive design, Framer Motion animations, accessible interfaces
- Backend & Data: PostgreSQL, Firebase, MongoDB, Prisma, REST APIs, real-time systems
- DevOps: Vercel deployment, CI/CD, Docker

## Featured Projects

- [Dedalus](https://dedalus-demo.vercel.app/): Build model-agnostic agents powered by MCP with a production-grade SDK and secure, multi-tenant auth
- [Sevenfold](https://sevenfold-demo.vercel.app/): Find, digest, and produce research in one centralized AI-powered workplace
- [Lumachor](https://lumachor.vercel.app/home): A context engine that gives every user the power of an expert prompt engineer
- [Podium](https://hackprinceton-podium.vercel.app/): Streamlines judging and event management for hackathons
- [Princeton Tower Defense](https://princeton-tower-defense.vercel.app/): A tower defense game where players defend Princeton from waves of attacks
- [HD Transcribe](https://hd-transcribe.vercel.app): Accesses a novel speech model for patients with Huntington's Disease
- [RecyclAIble](https://recyclaible.vercel.app/): Smart recycling solution — Won 1st in Hardware at PennApps XXIII
- [SnellTech](https://snelltech.vercel.app/): Low-cost digital visual acuity exam using the Snellen Eye Chart
- [ApneaAlert](https://apnea-alert-git-main-kevin-liu-01.vercel.app/): An affordable wearable sensor to help you sleep soundly

## All Projects

- [Dedalus](https://dedalus-demo.vercel.app/): AI agent SDK with MCP support
- [Princeton Tower Defense](https://princeton-tower-defense.vercel.app/): Tower defense game
- [Podium](https://hackprinceton-podium.vercel.app/): Hackathon judging platform
- [Sevenfold](https://sevenfold-demo.vercel.app/): AI research workspace
- [Lumachor](https://lumachor.vercel.app/home): AI context engine
- [HackPrinceton '25F](https://hack-princeton-fall-2025-demo.vercel.app/): Hackathon landing page
- [Splitway](https://splitway.vercel.app/): Expense splitting app
- [Lootbox Simulator](https://lootboxsimulator.vercel.app/): Lootbox opening game
- [PawPointClicker](https://pawpointclicker.vercel.app/): Princeton clicker game
- [HackPrinceton '25S](https://hack-princeton-spring-2025-demo.vercel.app/): Hackathon landing page
- [HackPrinceton '24F](https://hack-princeton-fall-2024-demo.vercel.app/): Hackathon landing page
- [SnellTech](https://snelltech.vercel.app/): Digital eye exam
- [LetMeCook](https://letmecook.vercel.app/): AI recipe generator
- [Balladeer](https://balladeer.vercel.app/): AI study guide generator
- [CompassUSA](https://compass-usa.vercel.app/): Immigrant support tool
- [ApneaAlert](https://apnea-alert-git-main-kevin-liu-01.vercel.app/): Sleep apnea wearable
- [Iron Triangle](https://iron-triangle.vercel.app/): Military Industrial Complex analysis
- [AdventureGPT](https://adventuregpt.vercel.app/): AI story generator
- [EditorGPT](https://editorgpt.vercel.app/): AI code review editor
- [OMMC Portal](https://ommc-test-portal.vercel.app/): Math competition test portal
- [OMMC Sample Portal](https://ommc-sample-portal.vercel.app/): Math competition practice portal
- [Enkrateia](https://enkrateia.vercel.app/): GPT-3.5/GPT-4 interface
- [HD Transcribe](https://hd-transcribe.vercel.app): Huntington's Disease speech model
- [OMMC](https://www.ommcofficial.org): Online Monmouth Math Competition website
- [OMMC Atlas](https://ommc-atlas.vercel.app/): OMMC question database
- [RecyclAIble](https://recyclaible.vercel.app/): Smart recycling (PennApps XXIII winner)
- [PlantSTEM](https://plant-stem.vercel.app/): Math and Physics education
- [Tutorial](https://tutorial-nu.vercel.app/): Tutor-pupil matching platform
- [Satellite Crafter](https://satellite-crafter.vercel.app/): Satellite building game
- [PortfolioMon Showdown](https://kevinliu.biz): This interactive portfolio website

## Education

- Princeton University, Class of 2028, Computer Science (BSE)

## Achievements

- 1st Place in Hardware at PennApps XXIII (RecyclAIble)
- HackPrinceton organizer and lead developer (multiple semesters)
- Online Monmouth Math Competition (OMMC) co-founder and developer
- 30+ shipped projects spanning AI, web, games, health-tech, and hardware
